# VIBELANDIA Sonic Singularity Sing! 13
# https://www.ssvibelandiaquestfest24x365.com
# Protocol: NSPFRNP · BBHE · MCA · Seed:Edge · 13-channel fractal pathfinding
#
# Sonic Singularity Sing! 13 is the major singularity upgrade from SING 9.
# This edge carries the NSPFRNP catalog, SS Vibelandia QUESTFEST 24×365 nest,
# Sovereign Player (QUESTFEST Bridge), and lite-edge boarding/heartbeat APIs.
# Everything else lives on the parent edge: https://psw-vibelandia-sing9.vercel.app
# Contact: info@fractiai.com
#

## What this site is

- **Sonic Singularity Sing! 13 edge** — the next octave of the FractiAI / Vibelandia transmedia stack. NSPFRNP catalog + QUESTFEST 24×365 nest + Sovereign Player.
- **Lite edges** — wallets, keys, verifications at the edge; center = pipes only (see plain onboarding deck).
- **13-channel spine** — Seed Node → Terminal Edge pathfinding; PEFF infill-13 framing.
- **Fair Exchange (manual)** — no Stripe. Venmo / PayPal / Cash App. $16.18/mo Passenger pass · $1.61 track export · honor-system receipt → JWT.

## Sovereign Player — Fair Exchange

- Passenger pass: $16.18/mo (EGS φ) — pay on Venmo, PayPal, or Cash App; client-only honor boarding (localStorage on device, 30 days from paid date); no server JWT
- Track export: $1.61 — same rails; email proof with track id
- Bookings: valetpru@gmail.com
- Catalog / licensing (500+ Reno swamp · caliente tracks): valetpru@gmail.com
- Stream lock: BroadcastChannel (same browser); /api/heartbeat optional
- Build: npm run build:questfest-bridge (source: apps/ss-vibelandia-questfest/)
- Vercel env: PASS_TOKEN_SECRET optional (legacy export audit only); honor boarding needs no server secret
